name: thunderbird-translate
description: Thunderbird 邮件全文替换翻译扩展

scripts.test: node --test tests/settings.test.js tests/html-text.test.js tests/translate-chunk.test.js tests/openai-batch.test.js tests/host-permissions.test.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/shared/html-text.js && node --check src/shared/settings.js && node --check src/shared/host-permissions.js && node --check src/background/background.js && node --check src/content/message-display.js
